name: Apple Cinnamon Coffee Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Grease a 12-cup tube or bundt pan with Pam cooking spray.
3. In a small bowl, combine cinnamon and sugar. Set aside 1 tablespoon; set remaining mixture aside for topping.
4. Toss prepared apples with the remainder of the cinnamon-sugar mixture.
5. In a large bowl, whisk together sugar, applesauce, vanilla, orange juice, and salt. Add egg equivalents and mix until well combined.
6. Gradually add flour, baking powder, and nutmeg to the wet ingredients, stirring until just mixed.
7. Spoon more than one third of the batter into the prepared pan. Cover with half of the apple mixture, then spoon in remaining batter and apple slices. Sprinkle top lightly with reserved cinnamon-sugar.
8. Bake for 1 hour or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean. Loosen sides with a butter knife, then invert cake onto a plate to serve.
